title: NAM Jharkhand Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Consultant posts
description: National AYUSH Mission Jharkhand (NAM Jharkhand) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the BAMS, BUMS, and BHMS can grab this chance and apply for the NAM Jharkhand Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
